nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I expect AI to replace all menial administrative tasks

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: it requires 100% accuracy, and if I were to ask a model for assistance I'd have to check its work anyway

nodes.label: AI handling of confidential data
nodes.grounding_span: Anything that relates to handling confidential/ sensitive data

nodes.label: AI as decision-making support
nodes.grounding_span: it would be helpful to use AI for decision-making

nodes.label: AI language and formatting consistency
nodes.grounding_span: the model can include English US (like using 'z' instead of 's')

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it was still much quicker than completing the task manually

nodes.label: Embracing technological progress
nodes.grounding_span: If people do not embrace the technology, they are likely to be left behind

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for repetitive tasks despite errors
nodes.grounding_span: it was still much quicker than completing the task manually

nodes.label: Caution toward AI for accuracy-critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: if I were to ask a model for assistance I'd have to check its work anyway

nodes.label: Firm boundary against AI for confidential data
nodes.grounding_span: Anything that relates to handling confidential/ sensitive data

nodes.label: Optimism about AI replacing decision makers eventually
nodes.grounding_span: even potentially replace the decision makers eventually

nodes.label: Frustration with AI language and formatting errors
nodes.grounding_span: the model can include English US (like using 'z' instead of 's')

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit assessment of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: It all depends on the volume of text. If it is several paragraphs, I will ask the model to re-do it

nodes.label: Forward-looking embrace of technological transformation
nodes.grounding_span: I am fully aware of AI's potential, especially once AGI is fully implemented
